creator: dwhite@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Please take a look at http://people.freebsd.org/~dwhite/courier-port.tar.gz 
and make sure I haven't comprimised it too much :-) 

It does pass portlint save for warnings about paths that are OK. I had 
to hack down the pkg-descr to the 24-line limit.
